message:
Expose Tantivy Fields struct and index reader for search client

Made the Fields struct and its members public to enable external query
execution modules to construct search queries against the Tantivy index.

Changes:
- Made Fields struct public with #[derive(Clone, Copy)]
- Made all 7 field members public (agent, workspace, source_path,
  msg_idx, created_at, title, content)
- Made TantivyIndex.fields member public for external access
- Added public reader() method returning IndexReader

This enables the search::query module to:
1. Accept Fields as a parameter for SearchClient construction
2. Access individual field handles when building TermQuery instances
3. Construct QueryParser with the title and content fields
4. Extract field values from search result documents

The Clone/Copy derives allow Fields to be passed by value efficiently
since it only contains 7 Field handles (lightweight integer-like types
from Tantivy's schema system).

No behavioral changes to existing functionality - purely API expansion
to support read-only search operations from external modules.
